name: oneui
description: One UI / JDS design-system coding plugin. Bundles the @jds4/oneui-mcp server (offline knowledge snapshot, component catalogs, brand tokens, the validate_oneui_code gate, and figma_to_code) with agent-native skills, slash commands, and an advisory validator hook. Builds OneUI-compliant React (web) and React Native apps from a PRD or a Figma frame, and certifies every output against the installed component API.
